hero.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
hero.author: Christian D. Larson

aries.general: Today is a day for taking the lead. Your assertiveness will inspire others.
aries.love: A surprise romantic gesture could strengthen your bond.
aries.career: Your ideas could be groundbreaking; don't hold back.

taurus.general: You may find comfort in routine today; indulge in simple pleasures.
taurus.love: Consider deepening your connection with words of affirmation.
taurus.career: Stability in your career will bring much-needed peace.

gemini.general: Communication is key today; share your thoughts freely.
gemini.love: Magic happens when you embrace playful banter with your partner.
gemini.career: Networking could open new opportunities for you.

cancer.general: Emotional depth marks your day; trust your instincts.
cancer.love: Nurturing your relationship will bring you closer together.
cancer.career: Work on collaborative projects; your empathy will shine.

leo.general: Your charisma draws others in; take center stage.
leo.love: Romance reignites; plan an exciting outing together.
leo.career: Ambition is your ally; pursue those big projects.

virgo.general: Focus on organization today; tidying up your space will calm your mind.
virgo.love: A heart-to-heart discussion can resolve lingering issues.
virgo.career: Attention to detail will impress your superiors.

libra.general: Balance is crucial today; seek harmony in all areas of life.
libra.love: Compromise will foster a deeper connection with your partner.
libra.career: Collaboration will yield the best results; seek teamwork.

scorpio.general: Passion fuels your day; pursue what excites you.
scorpio.love: Intimacy deepens as trust builds within your relationship.
scorpio.career: Your resourcefulness will set you apart from the rest.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls; embrace spontaneity and exploration.
sagittarius.love: Exciting dates will spark a renewed bond.
sagittarius.career: Your creativity offers solutions; think outside the box.

capricorn.general: Your determination pays off; stay disciplined in your efforts.
capricorn.love: Quality time together strengthens your partnership.
capricorn.career: Leadership roles will suit you; step up.

aquarius.general: Your uniqueness is your strength; let your ideas flow.
aquarius.love: Open communication will enhance your relationship.
aquarius.career: Innovative approaches can lead you to success.

pisces.general: Your sensitivity can guide you today; trust your intuition.
pisces.love: Artistic activities will bond you with your partner.
pisces.career: Creative projects shine under your touch today.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Success is not how high you have climbed, but how you make a positive difference to the world.
professional.author: Roy T. Bennett

professional.text: Don't be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
professional.author: John D. Rockefeller

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: The best way to predict your future is to create it.
motivation.author: Peter Drucker

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
motivation.author: Unknown

captions.text: Chasing dreams and embracing the journey.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Every day is a new beginning; take a deep breath and start again.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Life is short; make every hair flip fabulous.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: We are only limited by our thoughts.
tech.author: Unknown

tech.text: The great growling engine of change – technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: Innovation is the ability to see change as an opportunity – not a threat.
tech.author: Unknown

fun.text: Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all.
fun.author: Helen Keller

fun.text: The most important thing is to enjoy your life—to be happy—it's all that matters.
fun.author: Audrey Hepburn

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: In the end, we only regret the chances we didn't take.
fun.author: Lewis Carroll

fun.text: Do not take life too seriously. You will never get out of it alive.
fun.author: Elbert Hubbard

fun.text: If you can't laugh at yourself, you are missing the biggest joke of the day.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: The greatest weapon against stress is our ability to choose one thought over another.
faith.author: William James

faith.text: Everything you’ve ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
faith.author: George Addair

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, the journey is often more valuable than the destination.
wisdom.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The unexamined life is not worth living.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Wisdom is the reward you get for a lifetime of listening when you would rather have talked.
wisdom.author: Mark Twain

wisdom.text: Patience is the companion of wisdom.
wisdom.author: St. Augustine
